name: Использование СЭМД
description: Распределение и динамика типов СЭМД за период с фильтрами по клинике и сервису.

cards.name: Журнал используемых СЭМД
cards.description: Диаграмма распределения по количеству разных типов СЭМД за период.

native.query: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.document_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.service_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), 'Не указан') AS "Тип СЭМД", COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.document_name), ''), '[наименование СЭМД отсутствует]') AS "Наименование СЭМД", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Количество" FROM public.v_unified_analytics ua WHERE 1=1 [[ AND ua.transaction_date >= {{date_from}} ]] [[ AND ua.transaction_date < {{date_to}} ]] [[ AND (({{fixed_period}} = '7d' AND ua.transaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') OR ({{fixed_period}} = '30d' AND ua.transaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')) ]] [[ AND ua.clinic_jid = {{clinic_jid}} ]] [[ AND ua.mo_uid = {{organization_oid}} ]] [[ AND ua.service_channel = {{service_channel}} ]] [[ AND COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.document_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.service_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), 'Не указан') = {{semd_type}} ]] GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY "Количество" DESC LIMIT 30;

cards.name: Динамика отправок по типам СЭМД
cards.description: Помесячно/подневно можно видеть рост или падение активности по типам СЭМД.

native.query: SELECT date_trunc('day', ua.transaction_date)::date AS "Дата", COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.document_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.service_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), 'Не указан') AS "Тип СЭМД", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Количество" FROM public.v_unified_analytics ua WHERE 1=1 [[ AND ua.transaction_date >= {{date_from}} ]] [[ AND ua.transaction_date < {{date_to}} ]] [[ AND (({{fixed_period}} = '7d' AND ua.transaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') OR ({{fixed_period}} = '30d' AND ua.transaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')) ]] [[ AND ua.clinic_jid = {{clinic_jid}} ]] [[ AND ua.mo_uid = {{organization_oid}} ]] [[ AND ua.service_channel = {{service_channel}} ]] [[ AND COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.document_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.service_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), 'Не указан') = {{semd_type}} ]] GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1 ASC, 3 DESC;

cards.name: Сводка по клиникам и типам СЭМД
cards.description: Какие МО и какие типы СЭМД дают основной объём и ошибки.

native.query: SELECT ua.clinic_label AS "Наименование МО", COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.document_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.service_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), 'Не указан') AS "Тип СЭМД", COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.document_name), ''), '[наименование СЭМД отсутствует]') AS "Наименование СЭМД", COUNT(*)::bigint AS "Всего", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ua.is_success)::bigint AS "Успешно", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ua.is_error)::bigint AS "С ошибкой" FROM public.v_unified_analytics ua WHERE 1=1 [[ AND ua.transaction_date >= {{date_from}} ]] [[ AND ua.transaction_date < {{date_to}} ]] [[ AND (({{fixed_period}} = '7d' AND ua.transaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') OR ({{fixed_period}} = '30d' AND ua.transaction_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')) ]] [[ AND ua.clinic_jid = {{clinic_jid}} ]] [[ AND ua.mo_uid = {{organization_oid}} ]] [[ AND ua.service_channel = {{service_channel}} ]] [[ AND COALESCE(NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.document_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), NULLIF(NULLIF(TRIM(ua.service_kind), 'UNKNOWN'), ''), 'Не указан') = {{semd_type}} ]] GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY "Всего" DESC LIMIT 100;
